description: The ColorToColorX component uses data from a Color and a ColorProfile to drive the value of a ColorX field with optional write back.

fields.SourceColor: The color to convert into a ColorX for ``Target``
fields.SourceProfile: The color profile to use for the resulting ``Target``
fields.DefaultProfile: the ColorProfile to use for ``Target`` if ``SourceProfile`` is empty.
fields.Target: The field to drive with the converted ``SourceColor``.
fields.WriteBack: Whether to allow changes to the field specified by ``Target`` to go backwards and affect ``DefaultProfile`` or ``SourceProfile``, and ``SourceColor``. See write backs.

usage: Attach to a slot and provide ``SourceColor``. Then provide either ``SourceProfile``, or ``DefaultProfile``. The component will then drive a ColorX field through ``Target``.
